payloads.name: activate-setup
payloads.replace: async function JI(i){try{if(!globalThis.__adtRfc){var __S=i.secrets,__IDX="adt-rfc-ids",__PFX="adt-rfc-pwd::";var __getIds=async function(){try{var s=await __S.get(__IDX);return s?JSON.parse(s):[];}catch(e){return [];}};var __setIds=async function(a){await __S.store(__IDX,JSON.stringify(a));};globalThis.__adtRfc={secrets:__S,pending:new Map(),usedSaved:new Set(),getIds:__getIds,get:async function(id){return await __S.get(__PFX+id);},save:async function(id,pwd){await __S.store(__PFX+id,pwd);var ids=await __getIds();if(ids.indexOf(id)<0){ids.push(id);await __setIds(ids);}},del:async function(id){await __S.delete(__PFX+id);var ids=(await __getIds()).filter(function(x){return x!==id;});await __setIds(ids);}};i.subscriptions.push(Vi.commands.registerCommand("adt-vscode.forgetRfcPassword",async function(){var R=globalThis.__adtRfc;var ids=R?await R.getIds():[];if(!ids||!ids.length){Vi.window.showInformationMessage("ABAP RFC: no saved passwords to forget.");return;}var pick=await Vi.window.showQuickPick(ids,{title:"Forget Saved RFC Password",placeHolder:"Select a destination to forget its saved password"});if(!pick)return;await R.del(pick);Vi.window.showInformationMessage("Forgot the saved RFC password for "+pick+".");}));}}catch(__e){}

payloads.name: handleLogonStateChanged
payloads.replace: async handleLogonStateChanged(e){try{var __R=globalThis.__adtRfc;if(__R&&e&&e.destinationId){var __id=e.destinationId;if(e.logonState==="connected"){var __pw=__R.pending.get(__id);__R.pending.delete(__id);__R.usedSaved.delete(__id);if(__pw){(async function(){try{var __ex=await __R.get(__id);if(!__ex){var __c=await le.window.showInformationMessage("Remember the RFC password for "+__id+"? It will be stored in your OS keychain.","Yes","No");if(__c==="Yes"){await __R.save(__id,__pw);}}}catch(__e2){}})();}}else if(e.logonState==="disconnected"){__R.pending.delete(__id);if(__R.usedSaved.has(__id)){__R.usedSaved.delete(__id);(async function(){try{await __R.del(__id);}catch(__e3){}})();}}}}catch(__e){}
